html:
Exclusive to:  

The Captain Hat is a craftable Hat Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and a Straw Hat, Bone Shards and Seaweed to craft. It lasts 2 days, and a Sewing Kit will restore it to full Durability.

When worn, it causes Boats to lose their durability at half rate while sailing. It has no effect on the durability lost when the Boat hits Waves or is attacked. It also has no effect when the player character is not driving a boat. In addition to being crafted, it can also be found in Steamer Trunks, Blue Whales and X Marks the Spot treasure chests.

Due to being a relative cheap item to craft, it may be practical to use it instead of entirely relying on Boat Repair Kits or crafting new Boats, especially in long expeditions where the player is away from or lacks the time to gather necessary supplies.

Hamlet

The Captain Hat is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, it cannot be crafted as some of its materials are unavailable. Instead, it can be bought for 20 Oincs at the The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Captain Hat.
  • WX-78 wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Woodie wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Captain Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Captain Hat.

–Wilson
“I no longer have that sinking feeling.”

–Webber

–Walani
“I have been promoted!”
–Warly
“Look smart mateys! Captain on deck!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A HAT O' CAPTAININGS”
–Wilba
“Ahoy!”
–Wormwood
“Now I'm almost as good a sea captain as I am an aeronaut.”
–Wheeler

It also has no effect when the player character is not driving a boat. In addition to being crafted, it can also be found in Steamer Trunks, Blue Whales and X Marks the Spot treasure chests.
Due to being a relative cheap item to craft, it may be practical to use it instead of entirely relying on Boat Repair Kits or crafting new Boats, especially in long expeditions where the player is away from or lacks the time to gather necessary supplies.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Thuyền Trưởng là một Vật Phẩm Mũ có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng hải, yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu và Mũ Rơm, Mảnh xương và Rong biển để chế tạo. Nó tồn tại trong 2 ngày và Bộ dụng cụ may vá sẽ khôi phục nó về độ bền hoàn toàn.

The '''Captain Hat''' is a craftable [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Nautical Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and a [[Straw Hat]], [[Bone Shards]] and [[Seaweed]] to craft. It lasts 2 days, and a [[Sewing Kit]] will restore it to full [[Durability]].

When worn, it causes [[Boats]] to lose their durability at half rate while sailing. It has no effect on the durability lost when the Boat hits [[Waves]] or is attacked. It also has no effect when the player character is not driving a boat. In addition to being crafted, it can also be found in [[Steamer Trunk]]s, [[Whale/Blue Whale|Blue Whales]] and [[X Marks the Spot]] treasure chests.

Due to being a relative cheap item to craft, it may be practical to use it instead of entirely relying on [[Boat Repair Kit]]s or crafting new Boats, especially in long expeditions where the player is away from or lacks the time to gather necessary supplies.

=={{Pic|32|Hamlet icon}} Hamlet==
The Captain Hat is also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, it cannot be crafted as some of its materials are unavailable. Instead, it can be bought for 20 [[Oinc]]s at the [[The Sow's Ear Hat Shop]] in the [[Pig City]].
